projects.name: Agent Owner Action Board
projects.current_checkpoint: The 24h+ read is complete: Cursor has 12 views and no visible replies; GitHub shows 5 views, 1 unique visitor, and a suspicious 189-clone spike.
projects.blocker: The 24h+ signal does not justify building a connector; wait for the 72-hour read before parking or continuing.

owner_actions.where: Cursor Forum Showcase / Built for Cursor
owner_actions.what: Post the prepared Cursor Forum topic and provide the public topic URL.
owner_actions.why: Cursor Forum is a better-fit visible channel for agent workflow tools than the failed Reddit/HN attempts.

owner_actions.what: Provide the repository traffic screenshot for views, unique visitors, clones, unique cloners, referring sites, and popular content.
owner_actions.why: Cursor Forum showed weak visible discussion, so GitHub traffic is needed to decide whether the probe has any real pull.

owner_actions.what: Run the 72-hour read after the Cursor Forum topic has been visible for three days.
owner_actions.why: The 72-hour checkpoint is the decision gate for continuing, pivoting, or parking this product.

next_review.reason: 72-hour decision read after the Cursor Forum topic became publicly visible
